title: Light As Fabric
description: This is a modpack created to improve performance while also adding useful features such as zoom, shader support and dynamic lights.
body:
# Light As Fabric
Welcome to **Light As Fabric**, an optimized experience for Minecraft designed to offer maximum performance without sacrificing visual quality. This pack is based on Fabric Loader and is perfect for those looking for a smooth, lightweight, and modern game.

## Key Features:
### - Improved Performance:
Thanks to the integration of mods like Sodium and Lithium, the game better utilizes your PC's hardware, ensuring a significant increase in FPS.
### - Improved Graphics:
Includes support for Iris shaders (a dedicated graphics card is recommended for good performance) and the Continuity mod to make blocks like glass or green grass look even better, as well as the LambDynamicLights mod to illuminate dark spaces even when holding light sources in one hand.
### - Lightweight:
The pack is designed to be high-performance without the use of many unnecessary mods; in fact, there are about 20 mods, all designed to make the game better.
### - Quality of Life:
Small additions like the Zoomify mod or the aforementioned LambDynamicLights mod make life easier without significantly disrupting the game.

## Technical Details:
### - Loader:
Fabric
### - Versions:
- 1.21.11 (1.0)
- 26.1 (1.1)
- 26.1.1 (1.1.1)
- 26.1.2 (1.1.2)

I will also update it for newer versions (1.21.11+)
### - Shaders:
Iris Shaders only.

## Installation:
You can download the .mrpack file and easily import it to Prism Launcher, Modrinth App, or any Modrinth-compatible launcher.

Thanks to the creators of the mods included in this pack.

License: All Rights Reserved
